title: Thesis Proposal Technical Route
subtitle: Data-driven PV module degradation assessment demo
reader_question: How does the thesis move from monitoring evidence to defensible degradation-risk assessment?

stages.title: Research Question
stages.summary: Define the thesis problem and reader expectation.

nodes.label: Define degradation risk
nodes.detail: Frame the thesis around linking outdoor monitoring data with photovoltaic module degradation risk.

stages.title: Source Evidence
stages.summary: Collect and align multi-source monitoring data.

nodes.label: Collect field evidence
nodes.detail: Use inspection records, I-V curves, infrared images, weather logs, and maintenance notes.

nodes.label: Clean and align data
nodes.detail: Clean records, align time series, screen abnormal samples, and prepare train/test splits.

stages.title: Feature Route
stages.summary: Convert raw evidence into degradation indicators.

nodes.label: Construct indicators
nodes.detail: Build degradation indicators from electrical, thermal, environmental, and maintenance features.

nodes.label: Select feature groups
nodes.detail: Choose interpretable feature groups that support model explanation and ablation.

stages.title: Modeling
stages.summary: Estimate risk with interpretable uncertainty-aware modeling.

nodes.label: Fit interpretable model
nodes.detail: Train a model that maps indicators to degradation-risk scores and factor explanations.

nodes.label: Label uncertainty
nodes.detail: Attach uncertainty labels to risk estimates for cautious thesis claims.

stages.title: Validation
stages.summary: Check whether the route supports defensible thesis conclusions.

nodes.label: Validate on fault cases
nodes.detail: Compare against historical fault cases and cross-site evidence.

evidence.note: Historical fault cases and cross-site comparison

nodes.label: Review feature ablation
nodes.detail: Ablate feature groups and use expert review to confirm the result logic.

stages.title: Thesis Output
stages.summary: Deliver thesis-ready risk interpretation and inspection priority.

nodes.label: Output inspection priority
nodes.detail: Provide risk grade, contributing factors, and recommended inspection priority.
